Metadata.description: Ingénieur logiciel concevant des technologies web modernes, des interfaces évolutives et des systèmes autonomes pilotés par l'IA.

HomePage.title: I build products that scale.
HomePage.description: Full-stack engineer shipping Next.js apps, Supabase backends, and AI automations with n8n.

sections.projects_preview_desc: Architectures de produits numériques axées sur les performances et évolutives, répondant à des exigences commerciales complexes.

1.title: Architecture Web d'Entreprise
1.description: Écosystème numérique haute performance avec Next.js 16, React Server Components et i18n.

2.title: Réservation Autonome & CRM
2.description: Automatisation des rendez-vous synchronisant Google Calendar et webhooks SMS via n8n et serverless.

3.title: Laboratoire IA & Automatisation
3.description: Bac à sable en direct pour Groq LLM, analyse de documents et expériences d'agents en terminal.

ai_lab.title: AI & Automation Studio

chat.terminal_empty_desc: Ask anything about Next.js, Supabase, n8n integrations, or Berkay's projects.
chat.pdf_empty_desc: Upload a PDF, TXT or MD file — BEX reads the content and answers your questions.
chat.engineer_empty_desc: Ask about Next.js, Supabase, AI architecture, or Berkay's projects.
chat.placeholder_engineer: Ask an architecture or DevOps question...
chat.error_server_connect: Could not reach the server. Try again.
chat.error_api_key: AI service is not configured on the server.
chat.suggested_terminal_1: How to write Supabase RLS policies?
chat.suggested_terminal_2: How to create a streaming API route in Next.js 16?
chat.suggested_terminal_3: How to set up a Telegram bot with n8n?
chat.suggested_terminal_4: How to implement semantic search with pgvector?

chat.suggested_pdf_4: What is the author's main argument?
